name: Furkan Uddin
description:
Full‑stack developer, open‑source contributor, privacy advocate. Self‑taught, Linux enthusiast, and builder of free alternatives to proprietary software. Creator of Player (open‑source media player), LOFIII (Lo‑Fi streaming app), and the CRAFT Flutter architecture. I code on my own terms – no company, no deadlines. My work is driven by curiosity and a belief that software should be open, private, and accessible to everyone.

IMPORTANT: I have NO presence on Facebook, Instagram, or any Meta platforms. Any accounts claiming to be 'frkudn' or 'Furkan Uddin' on those services are fraudulent and should be reported.

worksOn.name: Player
worksOn.description: Open‑source media player for Android. Supports 50+ formats, 10‑band EQ, lyrics, PiP, and zero tracking.

worksOn.name: CRAFT Flutter Template
worksOn.description: Clean Repository Architecture for Flutter Teams – a feature‑first, backend‑agnostic template.

worksOn.description: Lightweight responsive utilities for Flutter – breakpoints, context extensions, visibility widgets.
